top3.sql:
SELECT chanceCreationPassing, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Ajax')
ORDER BY chanceCreationPassing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT chanceCreationPassing, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Ajax')
ORDER BY chanceCreationPassing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT chanceCreationPassing, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Ajax')
ORDER BY chanceCreationPassing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(chanceCreationPassing) AS highest_chance_creation_passing, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Ajax')
GROUP BY chanceCreationPassingClass
ORDER BY highest_chance_creation_passing DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT chanceCreationPassing, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Ajax')
ORDER BY chanceCreationPassing DESC
LIMIT 1;
